The '''maximum''' amount of Talent points you can get is '''105''' (15+20+20+20+30). ''(Or it can be bypassed with the [[Creative Collar]])''. Use it wisely...

Here are the documented talents:
<div style="columns:15em">
* [[Bed Dog]]

*[[Bed Finder]]
*[[Black Pelt]]
*[[Guard Dog]]
*[[Hunter Dog]]
*[[Wolf Mount]]
*[[Hell Hound]]
*[[Pack Puppy]]
*[[Pillow Paw]]
*[[Quick Healer]]
*[[Creeper Sweeper]]
*[[Doggy Dash]]
*[[Fisher Dog]]
*[[Happy Eater]]
*[[Pest Fighter]]
*[[Poison Fang]]
*[[Rescue Dog]]
*[[Shepherd Dog]]
*[[Roaring Gale]]
*[[Swimmer Dog]]
*[[Doggy Torch]]
*[[Doggy Armor]]
*[[Puppy Eyes]]
*[[Water Holder]]
*[[Doggy Tools]]
*[[Shock Absorber]]
*[[Mob Retriever]]
*[[Flying Furball]]
*[[Chemi Canine]]
*[[Fire Drill]]
*[[Sniffer Dog]]
*[[Gate Woof]]
*[[Ookamikaze]]
</div>

''(For gaining '''Talents''', see [[Leveling Systems]] or '''[[Items#Treats|Treats]]''' under [[Items]].)''
